title: Hay Stairs
description: Just adds hay stairs and slabs...
body:
# Description

Adds hay stairs and slabs!

![Example Build](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com//data/qvKWfFyZ/images/9fb8e7684089a6c1ece033ba264234953cc779c2.png)

# Why?

I wanted to make vanilla style thatched roofs and after looking for existing mods that would allow this I couldn't find any good options for fabric... I couldn't find any mods that added hay stairs and most of the mods adding extra stairs also added more features such as vertical slabs which personally I didn't want as I wanted to keep a vanilla feel.
